text.title: AARRR Pirate Metrics Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the report this methodology produces. Validator enforces the rule-set constraints.

example.note: Violates one or more of the forbidden patterns listed below.

list.item: tactics_queued items missing stage tag (rule tactic-stage-tagged).
stages object missing any of the 5 keys (rule weekly-all-five-published).
